brief_html: This message is sent to create an NLS-style account. It contains the client's salt and verifier values, which are saved by the server for use with future logons.
remarks_html:
This message is sent to create an NLS-style account. It contains the client's salt and verifier values, which are saved by the server for use with future logons.

See the NLS/SRP Protocol page for more information.
